title: King Charles praises Nato and urges defence of Ukraine in key speech during Trump visit
description: King Charles has extolled the importance of Britain’s “special relationship” with the United States in a speech to US Congress that made pointed reference to the importance of Nato, the defence of Ukraine and the climate crisis. In a speech that will be read as a veiled plea to Donald Trump to return to the [...] The post King Charles praises Nato and urges defence of Ukraine in key speech during Trump visit appeared first on NYT News Today .

title: Lotto bosses call for ban on bookies as 'bets divert €289m a year from good causes'
description: Ireland's National Lottery operator has urged the State to ban secondary betting on its draws

title: Details emerge regarding Lawrence Taylor’s health issue
description: New details have emerged regarding the health issue that put legendary New York Giants pass rusher Lawrence Taylor in the hospital last week. Taylor is receiving treatment for pancreatitis, according to TMZ.

title: Ankle monitor, Apple Support scams surge in Rapides Parish
description: RAPIDES PARISH, La. (WNTZ) - The Rapides Parish Sheriff's Office is warning citizens about a recent increase in local scams, urging public vigilance. The scams include schemes involving inmate ankle monitors, the Department of Motor Vehicles, Apple Support payment alerts and Publishers Clearing House. Law enforcement will not call to demand payment to recall a [...]

title: FCC Orders Early Review of Disney’s ABC Stations as Trump Feuds With Jimmy Kimmel
description: Parent company Disney is being ordered to refile for licenses for the eight stations it owns after the president and First Lady demanded the late-night host to be fired over a joke

title: First Community Bancshares: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
description: BLUEFIELD, Va. (AP) — BLUEFIELD, Va. (AP) — First Community Bancshares Inc. (FCBC) on Tuesday reported net income of $12 million in its first quarter.

title: First Community Bancshares: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
description: BLUEFIELD, Va. (AP) — BLUEFIELD, Va. (AP) — First Community Bancshares Inc. (FCBC) on Tuesday reported net income of $12 million in its first quarter.
